evals.prompt: give me a trade plan for NVDA
evals.expected_output: A complete SEPA trade plan for NVDA including: SEPA status with trend template pass/fail for all 8 criteria, VCP setup assessment, entry zone with pivot price, stop loss with dollar amount and percentage, position sizing based on $100k assumed account, 2R/3R profit targets, and exit watch rules. Should clearly show MA values and 52-week high/low context.

assertions.name: uses-exact-template-format
assertions.description: Output uses the exact bordered template with ═══ lines and all required section headers

assertions.name: has-sepa-status-line
assertions.description: Output includes the SEPA STATUS line

assertions.name: has-trend-template-section
assertions.description: Trend template section present with MA comparisons

evals.prompt: is SMCI a good setup right now? walk me through the trade
evals.expected_output: A complete trade plan for SMCI that prominently surfaces SEPA violations with explanations of why each matters, but still produces full entry/stop/target numbers. Should flag Stage 2 failure clearly.

assertions.name: uses-exact-template-format
assertions.description: Output uses the exact bordered template with ═══ lines

assertions.name: violations-explain-why
assertions.description: Violation descriptions explain trading significance, not just pass/fail
assertions.value: Each violation bullet explains why the criterion matters for trend trading

assertions.name: still-produces-targets
assertions.description: Despite violations, plan still produces 2R/3R targets (soft-gate)

assertions.name: has-stop-loss
assertions.description: Output includes a concrete stop loss price

evals.prompt: plan a trade on PLTR, I have a $50k account
evals.expected_output: A complete trade plan for PLTR with position sizing correctly calculated for $50,000 account. Risk per trade should be $500 (1% of $50k). Should detect Stage 2 status and flag violations if any.

assertions.name: uses-exact-template-format
assertions.description: Output uses the exact bordered template with ═══ lines

assertions.name: uses-50k-account-size
assertions.description: Position sizing uses $50,000 account (not the $100k default)

assertions.name: risk-is-500
assertions.description: Risk per trade is calculated as $500 (1% of $50k)
